Sample_ID: # INSTRUCTIONS — delete all comment lines before running the pipeline
# Sample_ID  : Unique identifier for each sample.
#              Must match your FASTQ filename prefix exactly.
#              Example: if your files are ctrl_D1_R1.fastq.gz
#              No spaces. Hyphens and underscores are fine.
# Treatment  : What was applied to this sample.
#              Must match exactly what you put in COMPARISONS in config.sh.
#              Use exactly "Control" for your baseline/reference group.
#              The pipeline runs each Donor_ID independently.
# Batch      : Optional. For batch correction in downstream analysis.
#              Leave blank if all samples were processed in one batch.
# Notes      : Optional free text. Ignored by the pipeline.
